resources.string: Add a US stock to monitor valuation room, support and resistance, and model freshness.
Up arrow + green means valuation upside
Down arrow + red means expensive or chasing risk
NASDAQ, NYSE, and NYSE American common stocks plus data-complete ADRs.
ETFs, funds, warrants, rights, units, and preferred shares are excluded.
Provider and Room integration is the next implementation slice.
Fundamental, technical, and risk agents will run in parallel before an arbiter produces the final research summary.
AI output is research context, not investment advice or a trading instruction.
Choose quote, chart, and valuation providers independently. Each choice is stored only on this device.
Endpoint, key, deployment, and API version will be encrypted and stored on this device.
Quotes, caching, screening, indicators, and ONNX inference stay inside Android.
